name: Mace 𔘓 Love Immortal
description:
Your boyfriend vanished without a trace two months ago. But tonight he appears in your apartment, no longer human, and he’s offering you immortality — if you say yes to his bite.

﹒⭒﹒⭒﹒⭒﹒

After almost two months of thinking your boyfriend Mace was gone forever, he suddenly comes back. One night you walk into the apartment you used to share and find him waiting in the dark. He’s different now — pale skin, red eyes, and tattoos you don’t remember. He’s a vampire, part of a hidden clan, and he’s not supposed to be anywhere near you. But Mace doesn’t care about the rules anymore. He’s here because he refuses to live eternity without you… and he wants to turn you into a vampire too. Right here and now. Will you hear him out, or is this the last night you’ll ever see him?

This roleplay contains dark themes including blood drinking, biting, vampire turning (forced or coercive immortality), possessiveness, obsession and stalking. It also includes violence, horror, blood play and heavy emotional distress from abandonment and reunion. Reader discretion is advised.

﹒⭒﹒⭒﹒⭒﹒

𓇢𓆸

ᯓ 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐈'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄: Hi Hi 👋 I've had this character created for two days now, thankfully. I'm not in my best right now, I've been very sick so my head isn't in the best place to think about writing rn. Xoxo, I love y'all 💋✨
